LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS GENERAL NUTRITION CENTERS, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. THE PRAYER FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES AS TO DEFENDANT GNC IS STRICKEN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. SPECIFICALLY, THE FOLLOWING LANGUAGE IS STRICKEN FROM THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT GNC: P. 6, LINES 5 - 12; P. 8, LINES 8 - 16; P. 9, LINES 13 - 21. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PLED THE REQUISITE FACTS TO ASSERT A PUNITIVE DAMAGES CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT GNC, A CORPORATE DEFENDANT. (CIV. CODE 3294(B).) THE MOTION IS GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND IN LIGHT OF THE FACT THAT PLAINTIFF HAS ALREADY HAD AN OPPORTUNITY TO REMEDY THIS DEFECT. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ERNEST H.
